name: Frosted Peanut Marshmallow Crispy Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Add marshmallows and toss to coat. Heat until smooth.
3. Blend in peanut butter.
4. Add cereal and peanuts; toss until well coated.
5. Press mixture into a greased 13" x 9-inch baking pan.
6. Melt butterscotch and chocolate pieces.
7. Pour over the cereal, spreading evenly.
8. Chill until set.
9. Cut into squares. Makes about 2 dozen.
